title: Custom Enchants
description: Add powerful custom enchantments to Minecraft beyond vanilla, complete with rarity tiers, effects like Lifesteal and Explode-on-Hit, and full PlaceholderAPI support.
body:
Custom Enchants lets you take Minecraft enchanting to the next level.
Instead of being limited to vanilla effects, you can add powerful abilities like Lifesteal (heals on hit) or Explode-On-Hit (area blast effect).

Each enchant has a rarity tier (Common → Mythic) that affects its availability and anvil cost.

The plugin features a fully configurable system where you can adjust stacking, level scaling, and repair costs. Enchantments are applied through enchanted books, work with anvils, and use Adventure’s component-based lore for clean display.

Built for Paper 1.21.4+ with PlaceholderAPI support, it allows dynamic enchant info in menus and messages.

Whether you're running a PvE dungeon, MMO-style world, or adding RPG depth, Custom Enchants gives your server a unique edge.
